meaning: n.针头,小东西,无足轻重的东西
examples: A pinhead is the head of a pin.
We have to admit he is a pinhead.
The doctor fastens the pinhead with rubberized fabric.
The use of a yellow-headed vulture, named Pinhead, and Mary's plunge into a bath are over-the-top touches.
This enables the protein shell of the virus to be analysed at the atomic level - something a billion times smaller than a pinhead.
